title: Off-chain session token with batched on-chain checkpoints

artifacts.description: Merkle-tree accumulator circuit: takes up to 100 session leaves (nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, expiry, sessionNonce) and outputs a single batchRoot commitment. Groth16 + PLONK dual build.
Accepts batchRoot + ZK proof from SessionBatch circuit. Stores (batchRoot, timestamp, poster) on-chain. Emits BatchCheckpointed event. Verifies proof via auto-generated SessionBatchVerifier.sol.
Groth16 verifier auto-generated from SessionBatch.zkey via snarkjs exportSolidityVerifier. Regenerated whenever circuit changes.

Mint, sign, and verify off-chain session tokens. JWT-shaped structure embedding nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, expiry, sessionNonce, and signature over those fields using operator EdDSA key. Validates locally without chain read.

Accumulates session leaves in memory, triggers batch flush when count >= batchSize or age >= batchInterval. Builds Merkle tree, generates SessionBatch proof via snarkjs/rapidsnark, submits to SessionBatchRegistry.
TypeScript types: SessionToken, SessionLeaf, BatchConfig (batchSize, batchInterval, chainId), SessionBatchProof.
Protocol spec: token format, signing algorithm, local verification algorithm, batching semantics, replay protection via sessionNonce, expiry enforcement, and batch root verification path.
Witness-only tests (fast) and full Groth16/PLONK proof tests (slow, FULL_PROOF=1). Covers: valid batch, leaf count boundary (1, 100, overflow), tampered leaf rejection, expiry edge cases.
Unit tests for mint/verify: valid token, expired token, wrong scope, replayed nonce, tampered nullifierHash, EdDSA signature mismatch.
Integration tests for batcher flush triggers: size-based flush at 100, time-based flush at interval, concurrent session ordering, failed proof submission retry.
Hardhat tests: valid proof accepted, invalid proof rejected, duplicate batchRoot rejected, BatchCheckpointed event fields, access control on poster.
Developer guide: how to mint a session token after handshake, configure batch parameters, verify tokens in API middleware, and interpret on-chain checkpoints for audit.

steps: Define SessionLeaf schema: (nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, expiry, sessionNonce) — all field elements compatible with existing HumanUniqueness and AgentPolicy circuit outputs

Implement SessionToken.ts: JWT-shaped structure with header (alg, typ), payload (nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, expiry, sessionNonce, chainId), and EdDSA signature over poseidon(payload fields) using operator key
Implement local verification in SessionToken.ts: check expiry, recompute poseidon commitment, verify EdDSA signature, confirm scopeCommitment <= original handshake scope (no expansion)
Write SessionBatch.circom: accept up to 100 SessionLeaf inputs (padded with zero leaves), build incremental Merkle tree depth ceil(log2(100))=7, output batchRoot. Dual Groth16+PLONK build.
Run trusted setup for SessionBatch: use existing pot16.ptau for Groth16 key; PLONK uses universal SRS — no new ceremony needed
Generate SessionBatchVerifier.sol from SessionBatch.zkey via snarkjs exportSolidityVerifier
Implement SessionBatchRegistry.sol: store batchRoot, verify ZK proof via SessionBatchVerifier, reject duplicate roots, emit BatchCheckpointed(batchRoot, poster, timestamp)

Implement SessionBatcher.ts: in-memory leaf accumulator, configurable BatchConfig (batchSize default 100, batchInterval default 10min), flush logic, Merkle tree construction matching circuit, proof generation via rapidsnark subprocess bridge
Write circuit tests (fast witness + slow full proof) covering valid batch, boundary sizes, and tampered leaf rejection
Write SDK unit tests for SessionToken mint/verify covering expiry, scope mismatch, nonce replay, and signature failure
Write SDK integration tests for SessionBatcher flush triggers (size-based, time-based) and proof submission
Write Hardhat contract tests for SessionBatchRegistry covering valid/invalid proof, duplicate root, and event emission
Expose mintSessionToken(handshakeResult, config) and verifySessionToken(token) in sdk/src/index.ts public API
Update spec/session-token-offchain.md with finalized token format, signing algorithm, verification steps, and batch checkpoint semantics
Write docs/session-token-guide.md with end-to-end developer walkthrough and batch configuration reference
Run npm test (fast circuits + contracts), then npm run test:circuits:slow for full proof validation
DCO sign-off all commits: git commit -s
dependencies: proveHandshake / verifyHandshake SDK API (handshake result feeds session mint)
pot16.ptau (existing universal SRS for Groth16 SessionBatch key)
rapidsnark_prover binary in circuits/build/ (production proof generation)
Operator EdDSA key infrastructure (already used in AgentPolicy)
SessionBatchVerifier.sol (auto-generated, must be regenerated on circuit change)
ethers.js / Hardhat deploy pipeline for SessionBatchRegistry
